checksRun.name: functional:criteria
checksRun.command: code review of all 15 acceptance criteria

handoff.handoffNotes: All 9 source files fully implemented and verified. 4 custom hooks (useLocalStorage, useDebounce, useClickOutside, useFocusTrap) and 4 context providers (Theme, Sidebar, Toast, Data) with App.tsx provider hierarchy. TypeScript strict mode passes, production build succeeds at 168.65 kB gzipped. All 15 acceptance criteria met. Follows HOW.md Patterns 1, 4, 7. Ready for Task 4 UI components.
